description: Canonical task structure — output of the INTERPRET phase (src/will/interpreters/request_interpreter.py). TaskStructure is the universal workflow handoff from the interpreter to execution layers. task_type uses the TaskType str-Enum (12 values: query/analyze/explain/refactor/fix/generate/test/audit/sync/validate/develop/unknown). VOCABULARY DISCREPANCY: ExecutionTask.task_type (src/shared/models/execution_models.py) uses a bare str validated against a YAML config instead of this enum — two surfaces for the same concept, governor decision required to reconcile. confidence is a float in [0.0, 1.0] expressing the interpreter's certainty about the task classification. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 1.

task_type.description: Canonical task type. Governed vocabulary: TaskType enum in request_interpreter.py. Values: query, analyze, explain, refactor, fix, generate, test, audit, sync, validate, develop, unknown. DISCREPANCY with ExecutionTask.task_type (bare str).

intent.description: Human-readable statement of the interpreted task intent.

targets.description: List of target identifiers (file paths, symbol names, etc.) for this task.

constraints.description: Structured constraints on task execution (dict[str, Any]).

context.description: Additional context derived from the interpretation (dict[str, Any]).

confidence.description: Interpreter confidence in the task classification. Range [0.0, 1.0]. Low confidence may trigger a confidence refusal via RefusalResult.
